headline: Buffett’s Final $140 Billion Trade: Here’s Where All His Stock Is Going, and Who Got Left Out

headline: Buffett: "tough to find value" when everyone is gambling
summary: Investing.com -- Warren Buffett criticized the stock market for being increasingly driven by speculative trading rather than long-term investing. The Berkshire Hathaway chairman told CNBC's Becky Quick that finding value has become difficult in the current environment.

headline: Should Buffett’s 2034 Pledge to Donate His Berkshire Stake Reshape BRK.A’s Long‑Term Governance Narrative?
summary: Warren Buffett recently outlined plans to donate all his remaining Berkshire Hathaway shares to four family-linked foundations by December 31, 2034, converting 8,000 Class A shares into about 12,000,000 Class B shares as part of this process. The shift concentrates future control of Buffett’s Berkshire stake in his family foundations rather than the Gates Foundation, subtly reshaping expectations around long-term ownership and governance at the conglomerate. We’ll now examine how Buffett’s...

headline: Buffett Says He Was Behind Berkshire Purchase of Alphabet Shares
summary: (Bloomberg) -- Warren Buffett said he initiated Berkshire Hathaway Inc.’s bet on Google parent Alphabet Inc., a sign of the billionaire’s support for the technology company’s spending on artificial intelligence.The Berkshire chairman’s successor as chief executive officer, Greg Abel, doesn’t make any decision Buffett doesn’t approve of, and vice versa, Buffett said in a CNBC interview Wednesday.
